rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding outputs to inputs via visible ports, not subcomponent paths.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries by restricting AGREE contracts to visible features, not internal subcomponent references.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes, not type annexes, to maintain scope integrity.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean equations with logical operators (and, or, not, =>) to express conditional output derivation from inputs.
Reference only visible ports or declared constants in AGREE expressions — never AADL properties or hidden subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Avoid embedding subcomponent port references (e.g., D1_dps) directly in AGREE contracts unless exposed as visible outputs in the component type.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
